name: Cranberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake mix, eggs, cranberry juice, and orange rind in a bowl. Beat until smooth, following the beating directions on the package.
2. Remove one-third of the batter and stir in the cranberry-orange relish and nuts.
3. Add enough red food coloring to achieve a deep red color for the remaining batter.
4. Alternate spooning the light and dark batters into a greased and floured 9x5x3 inches loaf pan.
5. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 65-70 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow to stand in the pan for 5 minutes before turning out onto a rack to cool completely.
6. Frost the top and sides of the cake with your favorite frosting.
Makes one 9x5x3 inches loaf.
